_doc: Golden RCA fixtures (A7 §3.3 / §3.8). Per method: a POSITIVE analysis that reaches a systemic factor (valid True, reaches_systemic True) and a NEGATIVE analysis that stops at individual/sharp-end error (valid False, reaches_systemic False). The negatives encode the spec-locked traps: a 5-Whys terminating in an individual act, an ICAM with no Organisational Factor, a SCAT with no Basic Causes / Lack of Control, a Fishbone with every cause under Man only, and a Swiss-Cheese with active failures only (no organisational-influence latent layer).

analysis.problem: Operator slipped on a spill in the packing bay.
whys: There was hydraulic oil on the walkway.
A coupling on the pallet wrapper was leaking.
The coupling seal had perished and was past its service interval.
Planned preventive maintenance on the wrapper had lapsed.
The maintenance scheduling system had no owner after a reorganisation, so PPM tasks were never raised.

negative.label: 5-whys terminal why is still an individual act (no systemic reach)

analysis.problem: Operator slipped on a spill in the packing bay.
whys: There was hydraulic oil on the walkway.
The operator did not clean it up.
The operator was in a hurry.
The operator did not care about housekeeping.
The operator was careless and ignored the rules.

positive.label: icam with an organisational factor populated

absent_failed_defences: Machine guard interlock was bypassed and not detected by inspection.
individual_team_actions: Technician reached into the machine while it was running.
task_environmental_conditions: Guard interlock could be defeated with a single magnet; poor lighting at the access point.
organisational_factors: No interlock-integrity audit programme; production pressure tolerated bypassing to keep the line running.

negative.label: icam with no organisational factor (sharp-end only)

individual_team_actions: Technician reached into the machine while it was running.

positive.label: scat reaches basic causes and lack of control

analysis.contact: Contact with an unguarded rotating shaft.
immediate_causes: Guard removed for cleaning and not refitted.
basic_causes: No documented guard-removal/refit procedure; inadequate training on lockout.
lack_of_control: Management system had no inspection step to confirm guards were refitted after cleaning.

negative.label: scat stops at immediate causes (no basic causes / lack of control)

analysis.contact: Contact with an unguarded rotating shaft.
immediate_causes: Guard removed for cleaning and not refitted.

positive.label: fishbone with non-Man branches populated and evidenced

Man.cause: Operator unfamiliar with the new SOP.

Machine.evidence: Maintenance log: e-stop test failed 12 May.

negative.label: fishbone with every cause under Man only (individual-blame bias)

Man.cause: Operator did not follow the SOP.

positive.label: swiss-cheese with the organisational-influence latent layer populated

preconditions.failure: Driver fatigued at end of double shift.

supervisory_factors.failure: Shift supervisor authorised the double shift.

organisational_influences.failure: Chronic understaffing drove routine double shifts.
organisational_influences.barrier: Staffing-level standard absent from the management system.

negative.label: swiss-cheese with active failures only (no latent organisational layer)
